'''davuku''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:meadowhawk|meadowhawk]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-v-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:meadowhawk|meadowhawk]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| davuku
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dævikith|dævikith]] || [[word:dævikij|dævikij]] || [[word:dævikish|dævikish]] || [[word:dæviki|dæviki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:davuvukuth|davuvukuth]] || [[word:davuvukuj|davuvukuj]] || [[word:davuvukush|davuvukush]] || [[word:davuvuku|davuvuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:davukuth|davukuth]] || [[word:davukuj|davukuj]] || [[word:davukush|davukush]] || [[word:davuku|davuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:davufkuth|davufkuth]] || [[word:davufkuj|davufkuj]] || [[word:davufkush|davufkush]] || [[word:davufkuf|davufkuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:davukuthu|davukuthu]] || [[word:davukuju|davukuju]] || [[word:davukushu|davukushu]] || [[word:davukuku|davukuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:davukuth|davukuth]] || [[word:davukuj|davukuj]] || [[word:davukush|davukush]] || [[word:davuku|davuku]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:davukuthul|davukuthul]] || [[word:davukujul|davukujul]] || [[word:davukushul|davukushul]] || [[word:davukukul|davukukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:davukuthuthu|davukuthuthu]] || [[word:davukujuju|davukujuju]] || [[word:davukushushu|davukushushu]] || [[word:davukuku|davukuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:davukuthun|davukuthun]] || [[word:davukujun|davukujun]] || [[word:davukushun|davukushun]] || [[word:davukukun|davukukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:davukuthuoro|davukuthuoro]] || [[word:davukujuoro|davukujuoro]] || [[word:davukushuoro|davukushuoro]] || [[word:davukukuoro|davukukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|386eaa0}}
